name: sopaan
description: Sopaan — AI-powered government exam prep for Indian students

scripts.lint: npm run clean:metadata && npm run lint -w @sopaan/server && npm run lint -w @sopaan/mobile && npm run lint -w @sopaan/admin
scripts.test: npm run clean:metadata && npm run test -w @sopaan/server && npm run test -w @sopaan/mobile
scripts.validate: npm run clean:metadata && npm run lint && npm run build:admin && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run i18n:check -w @sopaan/mobile
